_comment: Live pass/fail state for every assertion in validation-contract.md. Updated by user-testing validator per milestone. Status: pending | passed | failed | blocked.

VAL-BILLING-001.note: Covered by dashboard/layout.tsx auth redirect — deterministic without browser.

VAL-BILLING-002.note: UI logic complete and unit-tested via page-model; browser-automation evidence deferred to Playwright user-testing pass.

VAL-BILLING-003.note: Trial banner rendered when trialCountdownDays is set; Playwright confirmation pending.

VAL-BILLING-014.note: Profile-side rollover landed in M2; usage_counters reset re-confirmed in M3F4 quota-reset-on-invoice-paid.

VAL-BILLING-024.note: Invoice list capped at 12 in page-model; Playwright confirmation pending.

VAL-BILLING-025.note: Next-invoice date rendered from current_period_end; Playwright confirmation pending.

VAL-QUOTA-003.note: RPC atomicity proven by M3F1 20-parallel test; route is a thin wrapper.

VAL-QUOTA-007.note: 3-bar UsageMeterSet mounted on /dashboard and /dashboard/billing; logic unit-tested; browser screenshot pending Playwright.

VAL-QUOTA-008.note: Realtime subscription wired via Supabase channel; cross-tab live update needs Playwright to confirm the <3s SLA in a browser context.

VAL-QUOTA-009.note: Limits refresh via Realtime UPDATE on usage_counters today; full plan-change-without-reload scenario needs Playwright verification.

VAL-QUOTA-010.note: Inherits idempotency from M2F3 processed_stripe_events gate; full usage_counters reset test lands with M3F4.

VAL-QUOTA-011.note: API contract (402 + upgrade_url) complete; widget UI rendering of the generic message deferred.

VAL-QUOTA-013.note: UsageMeterSet mounted on /dashboard/billing inside the plan card.

VAL-QUOTA-014.note: Empty-state logic unit-tested (0 / cap); Playwright pending for screenshot.

VAL-QUOTA-015.note: Overshoot clamp to 100% unit-tested in usage-meter-model.test.ts.

VAL-SET-002.note: SETTINGS_NAV_ITEMS ordering pinned by unit test.

VAL-SET-003.note: Active-state logic unit-tested via isActiveSubRoute + resolveActiveHref; screenshot evidence pending Playwright.

VAL-SET-004.note: Site settings moved intact; existing fields preserved.

VAL-SET-005.note: Modal + API + toast + router.refresh wired; Playwright screenshot pending.

VAL-SET-006.note: toast.success('Saved') wired in settings save path; Playwright screenshot of visible toast pending.

VAL-SET-007.note: Parent /dashboard layout redirects unauthenticated users; transitive to all /dashboard/settings/* sub-routes.

VAL-SET-008.note: Mobile horizontal-tab fallback implemented; Playwright mobile-viewport screenshot pending.

VAL-FILE-001.note: Drop zone accepts 7 types via accept attribute; Playwright screenshots per type deferred.

VAL-FILE-003.note: PDF round-trip via pdf-lib + pdf-parse verified.

VAL-FILE-004.note: DOCX dispatcher wired to mammoth.extractRawText; real .docx fixture test deferred to adversarial-fixture pass.

VAL-FILE-005.note: PPTX wired to officeparser v5 parseOfficeAsync; real .pptx fixture deferred.

VAL-FILE-006.note: XLSX multi-sheet extraction verified via xlsx.aoa_to_sheet roundtrip.

VAL-FILE-015.note: Retry button wired to POST /api/files/process; Playwright pending.

VAL-FILE-016.note: MAX_EXTRACTED_BYTES cap wired via assertBelowCap; real zip-bomb fixture deferred.

VAL-FILE-017.note: Same cap applies to PDF extraction; real PDF-bomb fixture deferred.

VAL-FILE-020.note: /Encrypt marker detector + FileParseError('pdf_encrypted') routed to status=failed with readable message.

VAL-FILE-022.note: mammoth.extractRawText skips VBA by design; real macro-laden DOCX fixture deferred.

VAL-FILE-023.note: decodeText fatal-to-replacement fallback unit-tested with Latin-1 CSV.

VAL-FILE-024.note: match_chunks + system-prompt wired for file citations; Playwright end-to-end (upload PDF -> chat -> citation in widget) deferred.

VAL-FILE-025.note: Empty-state copy rendered when files.length=0; Playwright pending.

VAL-RESP-001.note: Empty-state card with 'No custom responses yet' + Add CTA rendered when rules.length=0; Playwright screenshot pending.

VAL-RESP-002.note: EditModal validates triggers (>=1) and response (non-empty) client-side with inline error messages; server mirrors via validateRuleBody(); 6 API unit tests cover each branch. Playwright visual pending.

VAL-RESP-003.note: POST /api/responses unit-tested with keyword trigger_type + triggers array; UI handleSave wired. Playwright CRUD flow pending.

VAL-RESP-004.note: Same path as VAL-RESP-003 with trigger_type='intent'; M6F1 schema test confirms intent acceptance. Playwright pending.

VAL-RESP-005.note: TriggerChip component renders each element of triggers[] as a rounded pill; list rendering unit-tested indirectly via rule rendering. Playwright screenshot pending.

VAL-RESP-006.note: POST /api/responses/test returns {matched, rule_id, response, via} — 2 unit tests cover match + no-match branches. TestDrawer UI wired. Playwright screenshot of drawer result pending.

VAL-RESP-007.note: Integration test proves embed + generateObject + rewriteQuery all uncalled on keyword hit.

VAL-RESP-008.note: normalize() lowercases + NFD; triggerMatches word-bound regex. 'Help' matches 'help me', 'HELP', 'Help?'.

VAL-RESP-010.note: Priority DESC with created_at ASC tiebreak; two unit cases cover both.

VAL-RESP-011.note: matchResponse short-circuits to null when zero intent-type rules; generateObject mock called 0 times.

VAL-RESP-012.note: DELETE /api/responses/[id] unit-tested (401/404/200); UI handleDelete updates local state on success. Playwright confirm-and-remove pending.

VAL-ESCAL-001.note: Empty-state card renders when rules.length=0; Playwright screenshot pending.

VAL-ESCAL-002.note: POST /api/escalation-rules unit-tested for turn_count+ask_email happy path (201 with persisted row). Playwright CRUD screenshot pending.

VAL-ESCAL-003.note: Keyword + ask_email CRUD unit-tested. Playwright pending.

VAL-ESCAL-004.note: Intent + handoff CRUD unit-tested. Playwright pending.

VAL-ESCAL-005.note: Reorder endpoint assigns descending priorities (top=N, bottom=1); unit-tested. UI fires POST /reorder on drop. Playwright drag-drop screenshot + DB assertion pending.

VAL-ESCAL-006.note: Higher priority wins across mixed rule types + created_at tiebreak proven by 2 unit tests.

VAL-ESCAL-007.note: userMessageCount >= config.turns fires; below threshold does not; non-numeric turns skipped.

VAL-ESCAL-008.note: Reuses M6F2 triggerMatches — word-boundary + diacritic/case insensitive. 3 unit tests including 'pricing' NOT matching 'price'.

VAL-ESCAL-009.note: Mocked classifier hit + null + preClassified-bypass paths. Integration: stream route passes preClassifiedIntent through from response matcher.

VAL-ESCAL-010.note: \x1E trailer with JSON {pending_action:{rule_id,action,action_config,via}} verified in stream integration tests for canned + RAG paths. Widget-side rendering lands in M7F4.

VAL-ESCAL-011.note: AskEmailForm renders email input + Send; widget POSTs source=escalation. Leads route test asserts upsert with source='escalation'. Playwright screenshot + live network trace pending.

VAL-ESCAL-012.note: AskPhoneForm renders tel + Request Call; phone-only insert path tested (email=null, source=escalation). Playwright pending.

VAL-ESCAL-013.note: ShowForm maps action_config.fields -> inputs; buildShowFormPayload promotes name/email/phone to top-level and preserves extra_fields. Unit + API-level tests pass. Playwright pending.

VAL-ESCAL-014.note: CalendlyEmbed renders iframe at 100% x 600px, guards against non-http URLs. Playwright DOM query + screenshot pending.

VAL-ESCAL-015.note: conversations.needs_human=true set by stream route on handoff action (stream-integration test asserts insert row). Dashboard conversations page renders ⚑ handoff pill when needs_human=true. Widget HandoffIndicator renders role=status with animated dots. Stream-side proven; Playwright visual pending for widget indicator screenshot.

VAL-HARD-001.note: Upstash sliding-window limiter wired via @upstash/ratelimit. Falls back to process-local Map when UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL is absent (dev + CI). Prod persistence gated on Vercel env vars being set before launch.

VAL-HARD-002.note: All four rate-limit sites (chat, leads, crawl/start, files) emit 429 with Retry-After header in seconds.

VAL-HARD-003.note: /privacy renders > 1KB via server component with footer links to /terms + /dpa.

VAL-HARD-004.note: /terms rewritten from 400-byte stub to 7-section ToS > 1KB with legal-footer cross-links.

VAL-HARD-005.note: /dpa GDPR Art. 28 addendum lists all 7 sub-processors (Supabase, OpenAI, Firecrawl, Stripe, Upstash, Resend, Sentry).

VAL-HARD-006.note: auth/callback fires sendWelcomeEmail via service-role + ledger (period='initial'). Resend dashboard evidence deferred to Brandon's launch config.

VAL-HARD-007.note: /api/cron/trial-ending queries the +3d..+4d window; per-row sendTrialEndingEmail with period=YYYY-MM-DD. Integration test asserts window width is exactly 24h.

VAL-HARD-008.note: maybeSendQuotaWarning fires once per period_start when used crosses ceil(limit*0.8); ledger backstops rare cap jumps.

VAL-HARD-009.note: handleInvoicePaymentFailed fires sendPaymentFailedEmail with period=invoice.id so retried webhooks don't double-send.

VAL-HARD-010.note: captureApiError(err, { userId, requestId }) tags environment/user_id/request_id via withScope. Init gated on SENTRY_DSN so dev/CI stay silent. Actual dashboard evidence deferred to Brandon's launch config.

VAL-TOS-001.note: Checkbox disables submit; handleSubmit returns early without network if bypassed. Playwright screenshot of disabled state pending.

VAL-TOS-002.note: <Link target='_blank' rel='noopener'> to /terms wired; Playwright click-to-new-tab test pending.

VAL-TOS-003.note: Migration extends handle_new_user to stamp tos_accepted_at from raw_user_meta_data; unit-tested via migration + acceptance-route tests.

VAL-TOS-004.note: Banner mounted in dashboard layout; billing upgrade APIs return 403 tos_required when null — 6 unit tests.
